No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit mention of poverty, economic inequality, or related social protection measures.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any content related to hunger, food security, malnutrition, or sustainable agriculture practices.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly dedicates three weeks to the topic of '健康 Sức khỏe' (Health), directly contributing to discussions around well-being, aligning with SDG 3.

Quality Education.reason: As a university foreign language course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops essential communication skills, explicitly mentioning '學習 Học tập' (Learning) and improving '聽說讀寫' abilities.

Gender Equality.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or implicit content related to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or schedule that relates to clean water, sanitation, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus provides no content or activities related to energy, clean energy, or energy access.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly includes a dedicated unit on '工作 Việc làm' (Work), which directly supports developing language skills relevant for productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any content related to industry, infrastructure development, or innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: There is no explicit or implicit evidence in the course material addressing reduced inequalities or social inclusion.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course syllabus does not include any topics or activities related to sustainable cities, communities, or urban development.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course material relates to responsible consumption, production patterns, or waste management.

Climate Action.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any content or activities related to climate action or environmental sustainability.

Life Below Water.reason: There is no evidence in the course material pertaining to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: The course syllabus does not include any topics related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or sustainable land management.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No evidence in the course material relates to peace, justice, strong institutions, or human rights.
